idea: Namespace-isolated deployment with Ingress and horizontal autoscaling
why_this_project_matters: This template moves beyond a single workload and introduces the traffic management and scaling controls most teams need in shared clusters.
architecture: All resources run in a dedicated namespace. A Deployment serves the application, a Service exposes it internally, an Ingress routes external traffic, and an HPA scales replicas based on CPU utilization.
steps: Create the namespace and apply the deployment stack into that namespace.
Confirm the ingress controller and metrics server are installed before enabling external routing and autoscaling.
Validate HPA target metrics and watch the deployment scale under load.
Tighten resource requests based on observed usage rather than guesses.
Add policy controls such as PodDisruptionBudget or NetworkPolicy as the service matures.
